channel.title: OnGoing Comics Searches
channel.description: Merged and deduplicated GetComics OnGoing feeds.

item.title: It’s Jeff – Brand New Week #1 (2026)
item.dc:creator: The Comic Guy
item.description:
GetComics.info ~

Year : 2026 | Size : 74 MB

Since he made his debut, Jeff the Land Shark has enjoyed the company of the Marvel Universe's greatest heroes — but all he wants is to be left alone after he runs into a clingy septapus named Ken! When they find themselves stuck together in a tricky predicament, will Jeff put aside his grievances in time to help them both escape? Plus, revisit some of Jeff's earliest encounters with Deadpool and Elsa Bloodstone! Collecting material from JEFF WEEK (2025), DEADPOOL (2019), and MARVEL COMICS (2019) #1000

The post It’s Jeff – Brand New Week #1 (2026) appeared first on GetComics

item.title: Universal Monsters – Phantom of the Opera #4 (2026)
item.dc:creator: The Comic Guy
item.description:
GetComics.info ~

Year : 2026 | Size : 138 MB

Christine comes face to face with The Phantom of The Opera. But who is the man under the mask?

The post Universal Monsters – Phantom of the Opera #4 (2026) appeared first on GetComics

item.title: W0rldtr33 #20 (2026)
item.dc:creator: The Comic Guy
item.description:
GetComics.info ~

Year : 2026 | Size : 96 MB

Months have passed since PH34R provoked Gibson Lane into committing a horrific killing spree that put the end of the world as we know it into motion. Now, his older sisters are ready to do whatever it takes to avenge him—and his brother Ellison must decide how far he’ll go as an accomplice to their plans.

The post W0rldtr33 #20 (2026) appeared first on GetComics

item.title: Deathstroke – The Terminator #3 (2026)
item.dc:creator: The Comic Guy
item.description:
GetComics.info ~

Year : 2026 | Size : 48 MB

THE BOUNTY IS OUT ON SLADE WILSON! It's said there is no honor among thieves. But there is a code among killers. Slade Wilson wrote the code. And now he's in Deadshot's and Deathblow's crosshairs for breaking its first rule!

The post Deathstroke – The Terminator #3 (2026) appeared first on GetComics

item.title: Hello Darkness #21 (2026)
item.dc:creator: The Comic Guy
item.description:
GetComics.info ~

Year : 2026 | Size : 147 MB

Hello Darkness plummets into the blackest depths of the human heart in this special mystery/thriller-themed anthology issue! In “Leading the Witness” by Ed Brisson and Damian Couceiro, a chance encounter with a stranger sends an innocent man down a never-ending spiral of self-fulling murder. And in “A Chase of Chianti, Heavily Discounted,” New York Times–bestselling crime writer Duane Swierczynski and George Romero Foundation’s artist-in-residence Ryan Carr get gruesome when a tough-as-nails mobster’s affair with his boss’s wife winds him up in a spot even his legendary pain threshold won’t withstand. All this and more for a bountiful bouquet of blood and bullets from BOOM!’s smash-hit horror series.

The post Hello Darkness #21 (2026) appeared first on GetComics

item.title: Something Is Killing the Children #47 (2026)
item.dc:creator: The Comic Guy
item.description:
GetComics.info ~

Year : 2026 | Size : 91 MB

The events of Valmont Mountain Lodge change Cecilia and Jessica Slaughter’s lives forevermore! In our newest entry to the Slaughterverse, the monster’s been slain, and Adda, Jessica, and Cecilia Slaughter must now deal with the fallout. Jessica intends to do everything in her power to protect the little girl who just lost her family. But will Cecilia share her views once she takes matters into her own hands? A life hangs in the balance — will the darkest side of the Order of St. George swallow it whole? ]

The post Something Is Killing the Children #47 (2026) appeared first on GetComics

item.title: Fall of the House of Slaughter #1 (2026)
item.dc:creator: The Comic Guy
item.description:
GetComics.info ~

Year : 2026 | Size : 128 MB

As the House of Slaughter’s ailing Old Dragon enters his final days, Cecilia Slaughter and the other Heads gather to determine his successor. Deadly ambitions begin to take shape as the House and the Order prepare for a new legacy to begin — and the conflict will no doubt be lethal in this all-new miniseries set in the world of Something is Killing the Children! Can the House of Slaughter survive a new Dragon coming into power?

The post Fall of the House of Slaughter #1 (2026) appeared first on GetComics
